# Skill Map

Maps personas to required skills. Used by `skills-required-guard.sh` to enforce
that code-writing briefs declare their skill dependencies.

## Persona Skills

| Persona | Required Skills |
|---------|----------------|
| `forge` | `tdd-patterns`, `verification-protocols`, `forge-ui-conventions`, `vitest-rtl-idioms` |
